questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "real"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "unreal"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "hypothetical"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "certain"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "likely"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "unlikely"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "consequence"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "depend"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "situation"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "solve"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "freeze"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "boil"?
Choose the best word: It is _____ to snow here.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "It is unlikely to snow here." — từ đúng là "unlikely" (khó xảy ra).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Every action has a _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Every action has a consequence." — từ đúng là "consequence" (hậu quả).

questions.question: Choose the best word: It _____s on the weather.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "It depends on the weather." — từ đúng là "depend" (phụ thuộc).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Describe the _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Describe the situation." — từ đúng là "situation" (tình huống).

questions.question: Choose the best word: If we work together, we _____ it.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "If we work together, we solve it." — từ đúng là "solve" (giải quyết).

questions.question: Choose the best word: If you cool water, it _____s.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "If you cool water, it freezes." — từ đúng là "freeze" (đóng băng).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Water _____s at 100 degrees.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Water boils at 100 degrees." — từ đúng là "boil" (sôi).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Ice _____s if it gets warm.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Ice melts if it gets warm." — từ đúng là "melt" (tan chảy).

questions.question: Choose the best word: If you try, you will _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "If you try, you will succeed." — từ đúng là "succeed" (thành công).

questions.question: Choose the best word: If you don't study, you _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "If you don't study, you fail." — từ đúng là "fail" (thất bại).

questions.question: Choose the best word: How would you _____?
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "How would you react?" — từ đúng là "react" (phản ứng).

questions.question: Choose the best word: If you see smoke, _____ others.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "If you see smoke, warn others." — từ đúng là "warn" (cảnh báo).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: If you heat ice, it ___.
questions.explanation: Zero conditional: present simple in both clauses.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: If it rains, we ___ stay home.
questions.explanation: First conditional: will + base verb in result.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: If I ___ rich, I would travel a lot.
questions.explanation: Second conditional uses past simple in the if-clause.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She would help if she ___ time.
Complete the sentence: Water boils if you ___ it to 100°C.
Complete the sentence: If you study, you ___ pass.
Complete the sentence: I ___ buy a car if I had money.
Complete the sentence: Unless you hurry, you ___ be late.
Complete the sentence: If he ___ harder, he would succeed.
Complete the sentence: If you press this button, the machine ___.
Which English word means "thực tế"?
Which English word means "không thực"?
Which English word means "giả định"?
Which English word means "chắc chắn"?
Which English word means "có khả năng"?
questions.explanation: "có khả năng" trong tiếng Anh là "likely".

questions.question: Which English word means "khó xảy ra"?
questions.explanation: "khó xảy ra" trong tiếng Anh là "unlikely".
